results.owner_or_reason: ADR-0001 (Transactional outbox to Kafka direct — no Redis bridge, formalizes D-S13) is not a direct coverage-index key, but wiki story E5-S1/E5-S2 ("[wiki] Transactional outbox row..." / "[wiki] Worker-role relay drains outbox → Kafka CloudEvents...") implements the identical decision under ids FR-W5/A-EVENTS, both coverage-index keys owned by ENG-2494/ENG-2495.

ADR-0002 (Native login removed — identity-only auth, formalizes D-S3) is implemented by wiki story E6-S2 ("[wiki] Exchange-token session-mint consume ... native login removed fully", feature-map line 634), covering FR-W6/A-AUTH — A-AUTH is a coverage-index key owned by ENG-2295/ENG-2499/ENG-2656.

ADR-0003 (Quota counters fail-open for cheap resources on Redis loss, formalizes A-QUOTA/F6) — A-QUOTA is a direct coverage-index key owned by ENG-2490, and wiki story E4-S2 explicitly covers A-QUOTA (Redis fast-counter pre-flight quota check).

ADR-0005 (Minimal standalone wiki — engine + identity mandatory, formalizes OQ-W4) is implemented by wiki story E8-S3 ("[wiki] Engine API internal-only ... + product-family-agnostic configured endpoints + graceful degrade"), which explicitly cites "ADR-0005 (sABdrZoQdp)" in its References and tests AC3/AC4 (configured *_URL endpoints, core CRUD survives knowledge/ai outage) — covers A-PORTABLE/A-APIBOUNDARY, both coverage-index keys owned by ENG-2508. The billing-absent Free-constant half of the decision is covered separately by E4-S1 (FR-W11, interim hardcode-Free).
